functions.name: StripLODGeometry
functions.description: This function will strip all triangle in the specified LOD that don't have any UV area pointing on a black pixel in the TextureMask.

functions.name: SetSkeletalMeshOverlayMaterial
functions.description: Set the overlay material for a Skeletal Mesh.

functions.name: SetSectionVisibleInRayTracing
functions.description: Set bVisibleInRayTracing for a section of a LOD of a Skeletal Mesh.

functions.name: SetSectionRecomputeTangentsVertexMaskChannel
functions.description: Set RecomputeTangentsVertexMaskChannel for a section of a LOD of a Skeletal Mesh.

functions.name: SetSectionRecomputeTangent
functions.description: Set bRecomputeTangent for a section of a LOD of a Skeletal Mesh.

functions.name: SetSectionCastShadow
functions.description: Set bCastShadow for a section of a LOD of a Skeletal Mesh.

functions.name: SetMorphTargetsToGeneratedByEngineForAllSkeletalMesh
functions.description: Set morph targets has generated by engine for all skeletalmesh in the content.

functions.name: SetMorphTargetsToGeneratedByEngine
functions.description: Set morph targets has generated by engine.

functions.name: SetMaterialSlotOverlayMaterial
functions.description: Set the overlay material for a material slot in a Skeletal Mesh.

functions.name: SetLodBuildSettings
functions.description: Set the LOD build options for the specified LOD index.

functions.name: RenameSocket
functions.description: Rename a socket within a skeleton

functions.name: RemoveLODs
functions.description: Remove all the specified LODs. This function will remove all the valid LODs in the list.

functions.name: ReimportAllCustomLODs
functions.description: Re-import the specified skeletal mesh and all the custom LODs.

functions.name: RegenerateLOD
functions.description: Regenerate LODs of the mesh

functions.name: IsPhysicsAssetCompatible
functions.description: Checks whether a physics asset is compatible with the given SkeletalMesh

functions.name: ImportLOD
functions.description: Import or re-import a LOD into the specified base mesh. If the LOD do not exist it will import it and add it to the base static mesh. If the LOD already exist it will re-import the specified LOD.

functions.name: GetSkeletonCurveMetaDataNames
functions.description: Retrieve all curve metadata name from the skeleton.

functions.name: GetSkeletalMeshOverlayMaterial
functions.description: Get the overlay material for a Skeletal Mesh.

functions.name: GetSectionVisibleInRayTracing
functions.description: Get bVisibleInRayTracing from a section of a LOD of a Skeletal Mesh

functions.name: GetSectionRecomputeTangentsVertexMaskChannel
functions.description: Get RecomputeTangentsVertexMaskChannel from a section of a LOD of a Skeletal Mesh

functions.name: GetSectionRecomputeTangent
functions.description: Get bRecomputeTangent from a section of a LOD of a Skeletal Mesh

functions.name: GetSectionCastShadow
functions.description: Get bCastShadow from a section of a LOD of a Skeletal Mesh

functions.name: GetNumVerts
functions.description: Get number of mesh vertices for an LOD of a Skeletal Mesh

functions.name: GetNumSections
functions.description: Get number of sections for a LOD of a Skeletal Mesh

functions.name: GetMorphTargetsGeneratedByEngine
functions.description: Get morph targets marked as generated by engine.

functions.name: GetMaterialSlotOverlayMaterial
functions.description: Get the overlay material for a material slot in a Skeletal Mesh.

functions.name: GetLODMaterialSlot
functions.description: Gets the material slot used for a specific LOD section.

functions.name: GetLODCount
functions.description: Retrieve the number of LOD contain in the specified skeletal mesh.

functions.name: GetLodBuildSettings
functions.description: Copy the build options with the specified LOD build settings.

functions.name: CreatePhysicsAsset
functions.description: This function creates a PhysicsAsset for the given SkeletalMesh with the same settings as if it were created through FBX import

functions.name: AssignPhysicsAsset
functions.description: Assigns a PhysicsAsset to the given SkeletalMesh if it is compatible. Passing
